title: AOS Diagnostic Artifact
description: Canonical schema for diagnostic artifacts produced on validation failures.

schemaVersion.description: The schema version of this diagnostic artifact.

artifactPath.description: Workspace-relative path to the artifact that failed validation.

failedSchemaId.description: The ID of the schema that failed validation.

failedSchemaVersion.description: The version of the schema that failed validation.

phase.description: The workflow phase where validation failed (e.g., phase-planning, task-execution).

path.description: JSON path to the failing element.

expected.description: Optional description of what was expected.

actual.description: Optional description of what was actually found.

repairSuggestions.description: Actionable suggestions to repair the validation failure.
